retrieved_result: Driver License Renewal Options: If you have received a post card asking you to renew in person, you must do so. The only exception to this is made for active-duty military members. Review the Real ID information below if you have not already upgraded to a Real ID. See also Driver License Fees. It is your responsibility to renew y
